final_text:
{
  "project_name": "Cricket Worldcup Management System",
  "business_summary": "The Cricket Worldcup Management System is designed to manage and organize the cricket worldcup events, including team management, match scheduling, and results tracking.",
  "actors": [
    "Admin",
    "Team Manager",
    "Player",
    "Fan"
  ],
  "functional_requirements": [
    "User authentication and authorization",
    "Team and player management",
    "Match scheduling and results tracking",
    "Fan engagement features (e.g., live scores, news)"
  ],
  "non_functional_requirements": [
    "High availability and scalability",
    "Secure data storage and transmission",
    "Responsive and intuitive user interface"
  ],
  "technology_stack": {
    "frontend": "React",
    "backend": "Node.js",
    "database": "MongoDB",
    "authentication": "JWT"
  },
  "architecture_pattern": "Microservices architecture",
  "modules": [
    "User Management",
    "Team Management",
    "Match Scheduling",
    "Results Tracking"
  ],
  "entities": [
    "User",
    "Team",
    "Player",
    "Match"
  ],
  "apis": [
    "User API",
    "Team API",
    "Match API"
  ],
  "integrations": [
    "Payment gateway integration",
    "Third-party analytics integration"
  ],
  "security": {
    "encryption": "Encryption for sensitive data",
    "audits": "Regular security audits",
    "access_control": "Access control and permissions"
  },
  "developer_handoff": [
    "Detailed API documentation and codebase"
  ],
  "qa_handoff": [
    "Test cases and environment setup instructions"
  ],
  "deployment_handoff": [
    "CI/CD pipeline and deployment scripts"
  ]
}
